title: Antares Legal advises SAMHI Hotels on collaboration with Ingka Group on Noida hotel
description: SAMHI Hotels Limited has signed an agreement, through its wholly owned subsidiary, SAMHI Skyline Private Limited, with INGKA Centres India Private Limited for leasing an upscale ~162-room hotel within Ingka Centres’ upcoming ~2.5 million sq. ft. mixed-use development in Noida, Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh.Antares Legal advised SAMHI Hotels on this transaction.The transaction team consisted of Siddharth Bhavnani (Partner), Surbhi Kothiala (Partner) and Divyanshu Bansal (Associate).The proje
